- auto_cars = 12, manual_cars =4 → semi_auto_cars = 20 -12 -4 =4. That's correct since 12+4=16, so 4 semi-automatic.

Available_cars is calculated as total_cars (20) minus rented_cars (3) and maintained_cars (2). So 20 -3 -2 =15. The semi-automatic cars are 4, which are part of the original 20. But are any of the semi-automatic cars rented or under maintenance? The problem doesn't mention that. So the semi-automatic cars available are still 4 (since none are mentioned as rented or maintained). Therefore, the percentage is (4 /15)*100 ≈26.666... The code correctly calculates this.
